recommendations.title: A California Christmas: City Lights
recommendations.overview: Follows Callie and Joseph one year after they fell in love, now running a dairy farm and winery, but their romance is threatened when business and family obligations call Joseph back to the city.

recommendations.title: That's Amor
recommendations.overview: After her job and relationship implode on the same day, Sofia starts from scratch — and meets a dashing Spanish chef who might be her missing ingredient.

recommendations.title: The Island
recommendations.overview: When his brother is killed, LAPD officer Mark leaves the city to return to the island he grew up on. Seeking answers and ultimately vengeance, he soon finds himself in a bloody battle with the corrupt tycoon who's taken over the island paradise.

recommendations.title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
recommendations.overview: Raj is a rich, carefree, happy-go-lucky second generation NRI. Simran is the daughter of Chaudhary Baldev Singh, who in spite of being an NRI is very strict about adherence to Indian values. Simran has left for India to be married to her childhood fi

recommendations.title: A Perfect Pairing
recommendations.overview: To land a major client, an LA wine exec travels to an Australian sheep station, where she signs on as a ranch hand and hits it off with a rugged local.

recommendations.title: Palm Springs
recommendations.overview: When carefree Nyles and reluctant maid of honor Sarah have a chance encounter at a Palm Springs wedding, things get complicated when they find themselves unable to escape the venue, themselves, or each other.

recommendations.title: Jab We Met
recommendations.overview: A depressed wealthy businessman and a spunky carefree young woman embark on an unexpected journey that changes their lives.

recommendations.title: Restraint
recommendations.overview: Two fugitives land in hot water when they take a hostage who poses a threat to their well-being.

recommendations.title: God's Own Country
recommendations.overview: A young farmer in rural Yorkshire numbs his daily frustrations with binge drinking and casual sex, until the arrival of a Romanian migrant worker.

recommendations.title: The Taming of the Shrewd
recommendations.overview: When a heartbroken scientist moves back home to start over, her scheming brother hires a handsome stranger to convince her to sell their land.
